post.description:
Authenticate user and return JWT token.

- **username**: Username
- **password**: Password

Returns access token on success.
Token expires after 1 hour.

Logout current user.

Note: JWT tokens are stateless, so this endpoint just confirms
the logout action. The client should discard the token.

get.description:
Get current authenticated user information.

Returns user details without password.

Get all users with pagination, filtering, and sorting.

**Admin only.**

- **page**: Page number (starts at 1)
- **size**: Number of items per page (max 100)
- **role**: Filter by role (admin/user)
- **is_active**: Filter by active status
- **search**: Search in username and email
- **sort**: Field to sort by
- **order**: Sort order (asc/desc)

post.description:
Create a new user.

**Admin only.**

- **username**: Unique username (3-50 characters)
- **email**: Unique email address
- **password**: Password (minimum 6 characters)
- **role**: User role (admin/user)
- **is_active**: Account active status

get.description:
Get user by ID.

**Admin only.**

put.description:
Update an existing user.

**Admin only.**

All fields are optional. Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description:
Delete a user (soft delete).

**Admin only.**

Admin cannot delete themselves.

get.description: Get all third parties with pagination and filtering. Read-only.
